programme.desc: Latest news and in-depth analysis from around the world.

programme.title: Fault Lines : Children of War
programme.desc: In Colombia’s war-torn Cauca region, a family is forced to flee after an armed group kills a young man who was once one of their child soldiers.

programme.desc: Latest news and analysis from around the world.

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds from around the globe.

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: Keir Starmer’s rapid fall from power and Britain’s revolving door of leaders. Plus, Argentina’s battle over memory, history and dictatorship.

programme.title: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Political scientist Robert Pape discusses U.S. foreign policy and its role in the world in the aftermath of the War on Iran.

programme.title: Counting the Cost
programme.desc: Is the Strait of Hormuz back in business and what does it mean for the global economy?
